title: verbascum maurum
intro: Verbascum maurum, also known as yellow mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Verbascum maurum include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of Verbascum maurum can be found in teas, tinctures, salves, and infusions, making it a versatile plant for various applications.
